description: tilize + reduce_row(mean) + sub(COL broadcast) + untilize. Full reader/writer data pipeline.

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, prepare_reduce_scaler(1/W) for cb2, prepare_reduce_scaler(eps) for cb3, batch 32 sticks per block push Wt pages

tilize(cb0->cb1), reduce_row SUM WaitUpfrontNoPop(cb1,cb2->cb4), sub COL NoWaitNoPop/WaitAndPop(cb1,cb4->cb16), manual pop cb1, untilize UnpackAndPackReconfig(cb16->cb17). Stage1 bypass: output to cb16 directly instead of cb5.
TensorAccessor for output RM sticks, wait Wt pages cb17, write 32 sticks per block via noc_async_write, pop Wt pages

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt(wait_upfront+manual_pop) c2:1/persist c4:1/1 c16:Wt/Wt c17:Wt/Wt

design_deviations: Stage1 bypass: sub output to cb16 directly instead of cb5 since phases 4-7 not yet implemented

description: Add square, reduce_row(var), add_eps+rsqrt post_op, mul_inv_std. Full layer norm without affine.

approach: Added phases 4-7: square(WaitUpfrontNoPop cb5->cb6), reduce_row(WaitAndPopPerTile cb6->cb7), add_eps+rsqrt_post_op(cb7+cb3->cb24), mul_inv_std(SCALAR NoWaitNoPop cb5*cb24->cb16). Phase 3 output now to cb_centered(cb5) instead of cb16. Manual pop cb5 after phase7. cb_eps waited at start, popped at end.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt(upfront+manual_pop) c2:1/persist c3:1/persist(wait_start,pop_end) c4:1/1 c5:Wt/Wt(upfront+manual_pop) c6:Wt/Wt c7:1/1 c16:Wt/Wt c17:Wt/Wt c24:1/1

details: max diff 1.6875 on 1x1x32x32. Output values are scaled wrong -- e.g. expected -0.8984 got -0.9180, expected 1.9297 got 2.9531. Values are close in sign but magnitudes differ systematically, suggesting inv_std computation is wrong.

description: epsilon tile prepared with prepare_reduce_scaler fills row0 of all faces. SCALAR broadcast binary_add expects scalar at [0,0] only. Extra values in row0 corrupt the add result, leading to wrong variance+eps, wrong rsqrt, wrong output.
evidence: systematic magnitude errors in output, prepare_reduce_scaler fills 16 cols in row0 per face but SCALAR bcast only needs [0,0]

description: Design error: Phase 7 mul_inv_std uses SCALAR broadcast but inv_std is per-row (col0 from REDUCE_ROW). SCALAR bcast uses only [0][0]=rsqrt(var_row0+eps) for ALL rows. Need COL broadcast to apply each rows rsqrt(var+eps) correctly. Similarly Phase 6 add_eps was fine since SCALAR bcast of eps is correct but result needs to stay col0-valid for COL bcast in Phase 7.
evidence: 1x1x32x32 shows systematic errors with different magnitudes per row - first row values close (using correct inv_std) but later rows diverge (using wrong inv_std from row 0)

change: Phase 7 mul_inv_std changed from BroadcastDim::SCALAR to BroadcastDim::COL. inv_std is REDUCE_ROW output with per-row values in col0, needs COL broadcast to apply correct per-row normalization.

design_deviations: Phase 7 mul_inv_std changed from SCALAR to COL broadcast - design error, REDUCE_ROW output is per-row in col0 requiring COL broadcast
